name: GH_Convert
summary: Provides static converters for different data types inside Grasshopper. This class both has specific and generic converters.

methods.name: BackSolveExpression
methods.signature: public static bool BackSolveExpression(string exp, string variable, double target, double minimum, double maximum, int steps, out double t, out double v)
methods.summary: Try and backsolve an expression

params.name: t
params.doc: Value for variable that closest approximates the target value.

params.name: v
params.doc: Value of expression for the best approximation.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure..

methods.name: ByteArrayToCommonObject<T>
methods.signature: public static T ByteArrayToCommonObject<T>(byte[] data) where T : CommonObject
methods.summary: Convert an OpenNurbs compliant compressed byte array into a RhinoCommon object.

returns.doc: A RhinoCommon object instance or null on failure.

methods.name: CombineDateAndTime
methods.signature: public static DateTime CombineDateAndTime(DateTime date, DateTime time)
methods.summary: Combine a pure date and a pure time.

params.name: date
params.doc: Must be a pure date instance.

params.name: time
params.doc: Must be a pute time instance.

returns.doc: A combined date and time.

methods.name: CommonObjectToByteArray
methods.signature: public static byte[] CommonObjectToByteArray(CommonObject data)
methods.summary: Convert a RhinoCommon object into a compressed byte-array using OpenNurbs serialization.

returns.doc: A byte array representing the object or null on failure.

methods.name: CreateDateAndTime
methods.signature: public static DateTime CreateDateAndTime(DateTime dateTime)

methods.name: CreatePureDate
methods.signature: public static DateTime CreatePureDate(DateTime date)
methods.summary: Convert a datetime structure into a pure date, i.e. remove the time portion. As per convention, this leaves 1 tick into the day in question intact.

methods.name: CreatePureTime(DateTime)
methods.signature: public static DateTime CreatePureTime(DateTime date)
methods.summary: Convert a datetime structure into a pure time, i.e. remove the date portion. As per convention, this means setting the year, month and day to 1.

methods.name: CreatePureTime(Int32, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public static DateTime CreatePureTime(int hours, int minutes, int seconds)
methods.summary: Create a pure time instance. If the total number of hours, minutes and seconds exceeds a full year then it is not possible to create a pure time and the largest possible pure time will be returned instead.

methods.name: FileToHash
methods.signature: public static Guid FileToHash(string path)
methods.summary: Create a hash of a file.

returns.doc: A hash of the file contents. File name and attributes are not taken into consideration.

methods.name: FindRhinoObjectByNameAndType
methods.signature: public static RhinoObject FindRhinoObjectByNameAndType(string name, ObjectType type)
methods.summary: Search the current Rhino document for an object with a given name of a given type.

returns.doc: An object that matches the name + type filter or null if no object could be found.

methods.name: GeometryToObjRef
methods.signature: public static ObjRef GeometryToObjRef(IGH_GeometricGoo in)
methods.summary: Create an ObjRef for a referenced IGH_GeometricGoo. Unreferenced IGH_GeometryGoo will return null.

returns.doc: An instance of an ObjRef when the goo is referenced geometry. It is up to the caller to Dispose of the objref when it is no longer needed Null for unreferenced geometry

methods.name: GetTimeKind(DateTime)
methods.signature: public static GH_TimeKind GetTimeKind(DateTime time)
methods.summary: Gets the kind of time implied by a System.DateTime value.

returns.doc: GH_TimeKind.PureTime, GH_TimeKind.PureDate or GH_TimeKind.DateAndTime.

methods.name: GetTimeKind(DateTime, DateTime)
methods.signature: public static GH_TimeKind GetTimeKind(DateTime A, DateTime B)
methods.summary: Gets the kind of time implied by two System.DateTime values.

returns.doc: GH_TimeKind.PureTime, GH_TimeKind.PureDate or GH_TimeKind.DateAndTime if both kinds are the same. GH_TimeKind.DateAndTime is one is a pure date and the other a DateAndTime value. GH_TimeKind.Mixed is one is a pure time and the other one is not.

methods.name: IsPureDate
methods.signature: public static bool IsPureDate(DateTime potentialDate)
methods.summary: Tests whether a DateTime instance represents a pure date (i.e. that the time portion is undefined). Pure dates are a Grasshopper convention, basically a pure date is 1 tick past midnight.

returns.doc: True if the date is considered pure.

methods.name: IsPureTime
methods.signature: public static bool IsPureTime(DateTime potentialTime)
methods.summary: Tests whether a DateTime instance represents a pure time (i.e. that the date portion is undefined). Pure times are a Grasshopper convention, basically a pure time is 2 ticks past any second.

returns.doc: True if the time is considered undefined.

methods.name: ObjRefToGeometry
methods.signature: public static IGH_GeometricGoo ObjRefToGeometry(ObjRef in)
methods.summary: Convert a Rhino Object Reference into Grasshopper IGH_GeometricGoo.

returns.doc: An instance that implements IGH_GeometricGoo on success or false on failure.

methods.name: ParseExpression
methods.signature: public static GH_Variant ParseExpression(string exp, bool recursive)
methods.summary: Attempts to parse an expression.

params.name: recursive
params.doc: If True, and the result of the expression is a String, the result is parsed again until the result is no longer a String or until the expression fails.

returns.doc: The result of the (recursive) expression.

methods.name: StringToDate
methods.signature: public static bool StringToDate(string text, ref DateTime date)
methods.summary: Convert a string representing a date into an actual date. If a pure date is possible it will be returned. If the input is a pure time this method will fail, you need to use StringToTime instead.

params.name: date
params.doc: If the string could be parsed, the pure date will be returned here.

returns.doc: True if string was successfully parsed, false if not.

methods.name: StringToGuid
methods.signature: public static Guid StringToGuid(string text)
methods.summary: Create a Guid based on SHA256 hashing of a string.

returns.doc: A guid representing the string.

methods.name: StringToTime
methods.signature: public static bool StringToTime(string text, ref DateTime time)
methods.summary: Convert a string representing a time into an pure time. Allowed separators of hour, minute and second portions are colons, semi-colons, points and commas. Grasshopper itself uses colons when formatting times. A PM or AM symbol is allowed provided it does not border on any alphabetical characters. A time can be prefixed by a "X day[s] + " string which defines the total number of 24-hour periods to include.

params.name: time
params.doc: If the string could be parsed, the pure time will be returned here.

returns.doc: True if string was successfully parsed, false if not.
